hero.subtitle: Lead Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I architect and ship high-performance web products — React, TypeScript, Node.js.
hero.training: Actively training · Deep Learning · LLM Engineering · Agentic AI

highlights: Intensive training: Deep Learning, LLM Engineering and Agentic AI
my-open-claude (Rust) — agentic LLM assistant with native tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash…)
go-kv (Go) — Redis-compatible server with zero external dependencies
orcrux (Go + React) — cross-platform desktop GUI for Shamir's Secret Sharing
Founded the Data Department and defined its technical vision and architecture
Led a squad of 4–5 engineers on a NestJS API and multiple Next.js applications
Migrated no-code infrastructure to fully coded solutions, reducing friction across departments
Integrated [Chargebee](https://chargebee.com) for billing automation and implemented SSO via [Clerk](https://clerk.com)
Developed blockchain-based applications on public/private Ethereum networks
Built multiple PoCs to validate product strategy
Migrated a PHP monolith to NestJS (DDD, CQRS) and Vue.js 2
Led a squad of 2 engineers
Built a Design System and a browser extension
Upgraded the payment system to Stripe
Implemented Keycloak for SSO
1st technical hire — laid the engineering foundations of the company
Designed a GDPR consent management system handling ~3,000 RPS
Migrated Angular 1 apps to Angular 2
Built a native mobile application
Created an e-commerce platform with REST API and real-time modules (websocket)
References: [GRETA Aquitaine](https://greta-cfa-aquitaine.fr/), [Oscar Kiwi](https://www.oscar.kiwi/)

orcrux.description: Cross-platform desktop GUI with Wails to test Shamir's Secret Sharing — generate, split, and recover secrets.

go-kv.description: A high-performance Redis-compatible server implementation in Go (no external dependencies).

my-open-claude.description: LLM coding assistant in Rust. TUI chat & single-shot CLI. Tools: Read, Write, Edit, Grep, ListDir, Glob, Bash. OpenRouter, streaming, history, slash cmds.

notFound.title: Page not found
